mapper.update: UPDATE sys_user SET username=#{username},name=#{name},dept_id=#{deptId},status=#{status},update_time=NOW() WHERE id=#{id} AND deleted=0
UPDATE sys_user SET deleted=1,update_time=NOW() WHERE id=#{id} AND deleted=0
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM sys_user WHERE id=#{id} AND deleted=0
SELECT * FROM sys_user WHERE username=#{username} AND deleted=0 LIMIT 1
SELECT * FROM sys_user WHERE deleted=0 AND name LIKE CONCAT('%',#{name},'%') ORDER BY id DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE sys_user SET password=#{password},update_time=NOW() WHERE id=#{id} AND deleted=0
UPDATE sys_user SET status=#{status},update_time=NOW() WHERE id=#{id} AND deleted=0
